chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-4501 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.18741/2025 3. For hearing of main case 30.09.2025 Mr. Abdul Aleem Kalhoro, advocate for the petitioners alongwith petitioners Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, APG I.O Ayaz Hussain of PS Nashahro Feroze --------- I.O Ayaz Hussain of PS Nashahro Feroze District Nashahro Feroze, is present in Court and states that he has recorded the 161 Cr.P.C statement of petitioner No.1 Mst. Uzma and on the basis of that statement, he states that he would file report in ‘C’ class before the concerned Judicial Magistrate. He shall ensure that he does so within 03 days of the date of this order. Instant petition is disposed of in the above terms along with pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
